case_title: ELISSA MERYL, PSY.D. VS. LINDA STOCKDALE et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ALYSSA HOLLIS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-27-2008 AT 1:30PM.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, LINDA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MERYL, PSY.D., ELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, LINDA HOLLIS, ALYSSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERYL, PSY.D., ELISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, LINDA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,595.00, DEFENDANT STOCKDALE DID NOT APPEAR THOUGH SERVED. PLAINTIFF'S PRESENTATION FOUND CREDIBLE. DEFENDANT HOLLIS NOT PROPERLY NAMED - DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-104) PROOF OF SERVICE RE: APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT. / ATTACHED NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERYL, PSY.D., ELISSA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-27-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-27-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT LINDA STOCKDALE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALYSSA HOLLIS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
COPYING FEES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERYL, PSY.D., ELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, LINDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIS, ALYSSA

SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY. FILED;FOR THE FOLDER.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $7,595.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $7,572.11 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, LINDA
APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERYL, PSY.D., ELISSA AS TO DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, LINDA NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERYL, PSY.D., ELISSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOCKDALE, LINDA $15,197.11 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,197.11
